overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The player navigates wet multi-lane streets, passes under overpasses, follows traffic through intersections, and stops at crosswalks while pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks. The scene features distinctive cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements, yellow safety barriers, and reflective wet pavement.

events.description: passing under concrete overpass into temporarily covered roadway
emerging from underpass back into open rain with increased visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets at moderate speed, approaching and passing under overpass structures

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead
bright yellow concrete dividers separating lanes from sidewalk
illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall futuristic lamp posts with green glowing accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through rain-slicked Night City streets. The vehicle approaches and passes under a massive concrete overpass, transitioning briefly into a covered section before emerging back into the open rain. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along sidewalks separated by bright yellow safety barriers, while digital billboards glow in the distance.

events.description: beginning to follow a red sedan ahead in the same lane
executing a right turn at intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: following a red sedan through city traffic, maintaining safe distance while navigating intersections

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead, occasionally braking at intersections

entered.detail: red sedan with illuminated taillights driving in the same lane ahead
tall palm trees lining the left side of the avenue
bright neon storefront signs glowing in pink and blue hues

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through the rainy downtown, now following a red sedan through moderate traffic. The scene features palm trees lining the avenue and vibrant neon signs illuminating the right side of the street. The driver executes a right turn at a marked intersection, with the overpass structure receding behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection district with holographic displays

events.description: turning left at large intersection, revealing distinctive yellow diamond-patterned building facade
passing oncoming traffic in adjacent lane while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections, turning left and proceeding alongside a distinctive yellow-lit building

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street at the crosswalk

entered.detail: building facade with distinctive geometric yellow diamond pattern lighting
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated graphics
tall contemporary structure with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The driver executes a left turn at a major intersection, revealing a striking building with yellow diamond-patterned lighting on the right. Holographic billboards float above the street while pedestrians cross at the intersection. The vehicle proceeds alongside the illuminated yellow facade, passing oncoming traffic in the wet, neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with commercial buildings and digital displays

events.description: coming to a complete stop at intersection to wait for crossing traffic
camera pans left to check for traffic, building facade temporarily fills the view

agents.ego_description: stopped at intersection, checking left and right for cross traffic before proceeding

notable_agents.action: white car approaching from the right, waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: concrete building with large vertical digital posters and advertisements
cars parked along the left curb near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle comes to a stop at an intersection, with the camera panning left to check for cross traffic. A building with large digital posters fills the left side of the frame while the driver waits for a white car to pass. The yellow diamond building recedes behind as the vehicle prepares to proceed through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective through a rain-slicked urban corridor that transitions from the shadow of massive concrete infrastructure into a vibrant, neon-lit downtown district. It begins by passing under a heavy overpass, emerging from the cover back into the open rain where pedestrians with umbrellas line the sidewalks behind bright yellow safety barriers. As the vehicle follows a red sedan through traffic, the scene opens up to reveal palm trees and glowing neon signs before the driver executes a right turn that leaves the overpass structure behind. The camera then shifts through a left turn at a major intersection, gliding past a striking building with yellow diamond-patterned lighting and floating holographic billboards. Finally, the vehicle comes to a halt at a crosswalk, panning left toward large digital posters while waiting for a white car to pass as the illuminated yellow facade recedes into the distance.
